title: Silver — legacy broker_outputs row
description: Deprecated schema retained for backward compatibility. Use schemas/broker_events.json for the primary pipeline.

field.description: Score/label field name within the broker

raw_label_or_score.description: Verbatim value from broker — string, number, or null

canonical_projection.description: Normalised float in [0,1] where meaningful, else null. Never replaces raw_label_or_score.
